_meta.description: CPU specification library for Innodisk Product Selector. Keyed by normalized processor_model (no 簧 ??symbols). Populated from Intel ARK, NXP product pages, and manual entries. Run parser/ark_fetcher.py to update.

meta.notes: Industrial RE-series Elkhart Lake. x7213RE is Rugged-Enhanced 2-core variant for robotics/industrial control.
Likely Raptor Lake-U embedded/rugged variant. May be i7-1365UE with RE suffix for robotics-enhanced. Verify exact ARK entry.
Alder Lake-P embedded Celeron. 15W TDP. Celeron 7305 = 1P+4E = 5 cores, HT disabled (threads=cores). Previous estimate of 10C was wrong (Core i5/i7 level). Verify exact frequencies via ARK.

Alder Lake-N based low-power embedded processor. ARK SKU 233393. NOT a Celeron ??product line is 'Intel Processor' (separate branding from Core/Celeron). Used in ASBC-3150 and similar AIoT SBCs. Verify frequencies via ARK.
HE suffix not standard. May be OEM/semi-custom variant of i7-13800H (14C, 6P+8E, 45W) or i7-13850HX. Verify with Innodisk datasheet or ARK search. APEX-P200 uses this chip.
TE = low-TDP embedded variant of 13900E. Same core count, reduced power envelope.
spec_matrix stores this as 'Intel Core i9-14900' (E suffix may have been dropped during extraction). Canonical name is i9-14900E.
HL = low-voltage H variant for thin industrial design. Same core count as 165H but lower base clocks.
spec_matrix stores this as 'Intel Core Ultra 9 285' (H suffix dropped during extraction). Canonical name is 285H.
PCIe AI accelerator card. No general-purpose CPU. 200 TOPS INT8.
APEX-X100-Q: Intel i7-13700E host + this PCIe AI accelerator card. 870 TOPS INT8.
Arrow Lake-S desktop (non-K), 65W. LGA1851 socket. AXMB-3150 highest-tier SKU. Intel removed HT in Arrow Lake ??threads = cores. DISTINCT from 'Intel Core Ultra 9 285H' (BGA mobile, 45W).
Arrow Lake-S desktop T-series (low-TDP), 35W. Same 24-core die as Core Ultra 9 285. AXMB-3150 low-power SKU.
Arrow Lake-S desktop (non-K), 65W. LGA1851. DISTINCT from 'Intel Core Ultra 7 265H' (BGA mobile, 28W). AXMB-3150 mid-high SKU.
Arrow Lake-S desktop T-series (low-TDP), 35W. Same 20-core die as Core Ultra 7 265. AXMB-3150 mid SKU.
Arrow Lake-S desktop (non-K), 65W. LGA1851. DISTINCT from 'Intel Core Ultra 5 245H' (BGA mobile). AXMB-3150 entry-level SKU.
Arrow Lake-S desktop T-series (low-TDP), 35W. Same 14-core die as Core Ultra 5 245. AXMB-3150 entry-level low-power SKU.

Preliminary next-gen H-series (300-series, post Arrow Lake). 'X7' tier prefix. 25W configured TDP as per AXMB-D160 and APEX-E400 datasheets. Exact core topology, memory type, and ARK entry unconfirmed. Verify when product launches.
Xeon 6 P-core (Granite Rapids). APEX-S100 primary SKU. 32C/64T, 245W TDP, 144MB L3. ARK-verified 2026-05-29.
Xeon 6 P-core (Granite Rapids). APEX-S100 second SKU. 32C/64T, 250W TDP, 288MB L3 (cache-optimized variant). ARK-verified 2026-05-29.
Xeon 6 P-core (Granite Rapids). APEX-S100 third SKU. 36C/72T, 205W TDP, 144MB L3. ARK-verified 2026-05-29.

Industrial IoT SoC (Dragonwing IQ-9075 / QCS9075). Full SoC ??NOT a PCIe accelerator. 5nm LPE. Octa-core Kryo Gen 6: 1 Prime @3.36GHz + 3 Gold @2.8GHz + 2 Silver @2.0GHz + 2 LP cores. 100 Dense TOPS (INT8 dense, used here) / 200 TOPS INT8 sparse (marketing figure, not used). Adreno 663 GPU (up to 1.2 TFLOPS FP32). 36GB ECC LPDDR5X. 1x PCIe Gen4 x4. Used in APEX-A100 (IPA BU). Source: Lantronix EVK page + CNX Software 2026-01.

_lookup_aliases.note: Maps variant model strings (as extracted from PDFs) to canonical library keys. Note: 'Intel Core Ultra 9 285' is now a direct key (desktop LGA1851) ??use _part_no_overrides to route mobile 285H products explicitly.

_part_no_overrides.note: Maps part_no ??processor_model. Applied by schema_builder._enrich_from_cpu_library() as last-resort fallback when PDF extraction fails OR to correct mismatches (e.g. H-suffix dropped, wrong model extracted). Priority: _part_no_overrides > extracted processor_model > alias lookup.
